# Earthwise Excavating

> Your Partner in Conservation-Focused Excavating & Land Management Practices

Earthwise Excavating brings over two decades of expertise in land development with a deep commitment to conservation. Serving Clarksville, OH and Southwest Ohio. Call (513) 212-7585.

## Services

- Building Pads & Fine Grading
- Drainage & Erosion Control
- Light Clearing
- Driveways
- Ponds
- Bush Hogging
- Basements
- Storm Work
- Seeding

## Service Areas

Clarksville, Wilmington, Hillsboro, Blanchester, Sabina, Greenfield, Chillicothe, Washington Court House, Midland, Leesburg, New Vienna, Lynchburg, Morrow, Batavia, Georgetown (Clarksville, OH)

## Contact

- Phone: (513) 212-7585
